zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Godbold於1500年出生在英國素福爾可丹寧頓時，她的父親Roger Godbold27歲，母親Margery Roger22歲。她於1521年與William Bert在英國素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1536年1月12日在英國素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Godbold于1500年出生在英国素福爾可丹寧頓时，她的父亲Roger Godbold27岁，母亲Margery Roger22岁。她于1521年与William Bert在英国素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1536年1月12日在英国素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Godbold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): from the Middle English and Old French personal name Godebald, Godbaud, a medieval French form of the ancient Germanic name Godebald, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ or god ‘god’ + bald ‘bold, brave’.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Godbold was born in 1500, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, her father, Roger Godbold, was 27 and her mother, Margery Roger, was 22. She married William Bert in 1521, in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 12 January 1536, in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Godbold est née en 1500, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Roger Godbold, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery Roger, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Bert en 1521, à Stradbroke, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 janvier 1536, à Stradbroke, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Godbold 1500 in Dennington, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Godbold 27 und ihre Mutter Margery Roger 22. Sie hat 1521 in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England William Bert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Januar 1536 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Godbold è nata il nel 1500 nel Dennington, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Roger Godbold, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Margery Roger, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William Bert nel 1521, nel Stradbroke, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 gennaio 1536, nel Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Godboldが1500年にイギリススフォルクデニントンで生まれた時，父Roger Godboldは27歳，母Margery Rogerは22歳であった。1521年にイギリススフォルクストラドブロクでWilliam Bertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1536年1月12日にイギリススフォルクストラドブロクで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Godbold(이)가 1500년 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Godbold(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Roger(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1521년 영국 수폴크 스트라드브로크에서 William Bert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1536년 1월 12일 영국 수폴크 스트라드브로크에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Godbold nasceu em 1500, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Godbold, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery Roger, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William Bert em 1521, em Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1536, em Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Godbold родилась в 1500 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Godbold было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Roger, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bert в 1521 г. в местности страдброк, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 12 января 1536 г. в местности страдброк, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Godbold nació en 1500, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Godbold, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margery Roger, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William Bert en 1521, en Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de enero de 1536, en Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
